items.title: Canada's Carney launches a sovereign wealth fund. What is it?
items.dek: The fund - which Canadians can invest in directly - will help pay for major infrastructure projects in the country, the prime minister says.
items.body: The fund - which Canadians can invest in directly - will help pay for major infrastructure projects in the country, the prime minister says.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Melania Trump urges ABC to 'take stand' on Jimmy Kimmel after widow joke
items.dek: In a parody aired days before the White House Correspondents' Dinner, Kimmel called Melania an "expectant widow".
items.body: In a parody aired days before the White House Correspondents' Dinner, Kimmel called Melania an "expectant widow".
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Venice opera house drops incoming music director after nepotism remarks
items.dek: Beatrice Venezi's appointment had been marred in controversy since being announced last September, prompting orchestra members to go on strike.
items.body: Beatrice Venezi's appointment had been marred in controversy since being announced last September, prompting orchestra members to go on strike.
items.author: IriLine Desk
